docs.title: Open-Source Europe
docs.text: A semester abroad in Copenhagen, documented like a codebase. Every trip, every route, every budget decision — logged and mapped.

docs.title: Basecamp
docs.text:
Copenhagen, Denmark. Home for the spring 2026 exchange semester, and the starting point for everything that follows.

Parameter Value Base Copenhagen, Denmark Semester Spring 2026 Budget €1,700 total Dietary Halal only

docs.title: The Approach
docs.text:
This isn't a travel blog. It's a documentation site — structured, searchable, and built to last longer than an Instagram story. Each trip gets its own versioned release page. Logistics are logged like API calls. Mistakes go in the error logs.

The semester starts here, in Copenhagen. The trips come later.

docs.title: What's Here So Far
docs.text: • Prerequisites — Gear, apps, and prep work before anything else.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Everything that needs to be sorted before the first trip.

docs.title: Essentials
docs.text: Item Purpose Notes ESN Card Discount card for exchange students Unlocks 20 kg free Ryanair baggage, museum discounts, and FlixBus deals Zabihah App Find Halal restaurants worldwide Primary tool for locating verified Halal food in every city Tuna Cans Emergency meals Budget-saving fallback for expensive cities (Scandinavia especially) Backpack (40L) Carry-on only travel Keeps things light — no checked bags, no waiting at carousels

docs.title: Apps & Accounts
docs.text:
• Rejseplanen — Denmark's public transit planner. Essential for getting around Copenhagen.
  • Ryanair — Cheap flights across Europe. Book 4–6 weeks early.
  • FlixBus — Budget intercity buses when trains are too expensive.
  • Google Maps (Offline) — Download city maps before each trip.
  • Wise / Revolut — Multi-currency card, no foreign transaction fees.
  • Hostelworld — Booking hostels. Sort by rating, not price.

docs.title: Packing Philosophy
docs.text:
One bag, every trip

If it doesn't fit in the 40L backpack, it doesn't come. This keeps flights cheap (carry-on only) and movement fast. Laundry every 3 days.

docs.title: Budget Allocation
docs.text:
Total Budget .............. €1,700
├── Flights ............... ~€400
├── Trains & Buses ........ ~€200
├── Accommodation ......... ~€500
├── Food .................. ~€400
└── Souvenirs & Misc ...... ~€200

This is a rough split

Actual spending varies by city. Scandinavia eats budgets alive; Central Europe is forgiving.
